title: Community Stack Submission
description: Tiny pointer file that registers a third-party stack on frenxt.com. The actual stack content lives in the publisher's own GitHub repo at .cables/stack.json.

repo.description: GitHub repo in owner/repo format, public only.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA pinning the stack content.

submitted_by.description: GitHub username; must equal repo owner and PR author.
